allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Add serial monitor utility and troubleshooting guide *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix MAX_MOTORS not declared in scope error *)
Bash(git commit -m 'FIX: Correct velocity range in MIT command encoding to ±30 rad/s *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix servo mode to use correct Position Loop Mode \(mode 4\) format *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add serial debug output and test command *)
Bash(git commit -m 'MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Remove all MIT mode code, servo-only now *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add MIT mode archive and fix readInitialAngle function *)
